title: Include stdio in CoAP server
description: Boot failure discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.5. coap_client firmware pulls in coap_server.c, which calls snprintf without including <stdio.h>; strict Zephyr compilation stops before runtime. Add the required standard header rather than disabling the server or warnings.
acceptance_criteria: 1. coap_server.c declares snprintf through <stdio.h>. 2. No warning suppression or feature disabling is added. 3. Native64 coap_client firmware boots and all ztests pass. 4. Three independent review passes complete.
close_reason: Added direct standard declarations and moved the iterable CoAP linker section to subsystem ownership; coap_client boots and all 5 cases pass; review completed.
